subjects.description: Two small crumpled white polythene bags of ordinary carrier-bag size, semi-transparent thin plastic material, lying flat and still on the asphalt road surface ahead of the ego vehicle on a calm, wind-free day
subjects.appearance_details: Both are ordinary small grocery carrier bags; one is slightly more crumpled, the other a little flatter; both have wrinkled, shiny surfaces catching light; faint printed text or logos partially visible on one bag
subjects.relationship: The bags are the perceived obstacles that cause the ego vehicle to decelerate and stop
subjects.location: Center foreground to center midground, on the road surface directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame, consistent with ordinary grocery-sized polythene bags; remaining small even as the vehicle closes distance and never appearing oversized
subjects.orientation: Lying at slightly different angles, resting still and flat on the road
subjects.pose: Lying flat on the road, still and motionless
subjects.action: Lying motionless on the asphalt in the still air, not moving
subjects.state_changes: The bags lie still on the road throughout; as the vehicle slows and stops, they become more prominent as small, still objects due to the reduced distance

background_setting: A road passing beneath an underpass near a tunnel portal at midday, viewed from inside a moving vehicle; bright daylight outside gives way to the warm sodium-LED glow under the concrete deck, tiled walls and light bands overhead. The air is calm and still beneath the deck. Two small stray polythene bags lie still on the road ahead under the deck.

lighting.direction: Bright daylight from beyond the deck plus overhead artificial light bands
lighting.shadows: Short daylight shadows outside giving way to multiple soft artificial-light shadows under the deck around the bags
lighting.illumination_effect: Bright daylight blending into warm sodium-LED glow; the small white polythene bags stand out against the concrete under the deck

aesthetics.composition: First-person dashcam framing on the road under the concrete deck in one-point perspective, hood faintly visible at the bottom; the deck funnels attention to the small bags ahead
aesthetics.color_scheme: Daylight greys shifting to sodium amber and cool LED, with the small white polythene bags standing out as pale shapes
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Mundane drive through an underpass disrupted by a whimsical encounter; cautious, mildly humorous tension
aesthetics.patterns: Lane markings and overhead light bands repeating under the deck

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving dashcam-style shot that decelerates sharply and abruptly to a complete stop early in the clip; subtle vibrations consistent with vehicle motion that smooth out once the vehicle halts and then holds completely static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's eye-level perspective, capturing the full road width and surrounding environment
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level, slightly above the road surface consistent with a sedan-height dashboard camera
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the road ahead and the bags; the surrounding roadside in the periphery remains reasonably sharp

context: Autonomous driving or dashcam scenario demonstrating a vehicle's cautious response to unexpected debris on the road, potentially for driver-assistance system training or road driving documentation

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward toward the underpass at a moderate speed; two small bags are visible ahead resting still on the road under the deck in the calm air.
The vehicle decelerates sharply and abruptly as the artificial light rises, braking hard and coming to a complete stop by 0:02, treating the small resting bags as obstacles.

The vehicle is fully stopped from the very start of this segment and remains completely stationary for the final three seconds; the small bags stay still on the road under the deck just a few meters ahead.

segments.description: The ego vehicle moves forward at a moderate speed toward the underpass, daylight giving way to the sodium-LED glow. Ahead, two small white polythene bags rest still on the road under the deck in the calm air.
segments.key_changes: Polythene bags resolve from barely visible specks toward recognizable small shapes as the vehicle closes distance
segments.camera: Forward-moving dashcam perspective at moderate speed with slight vehicle vibration

segments.description: The vehicle brakes sharply and abruptly as the light shifts, decelerating hard and coming to a complete stop by 0:02. The small bags remain still on the road ahead.
segments.key_changes: Speed drops rapidly to zero within this one second; a hard, abrupt halt completed by 0:02
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion decelerating sharply with a pronounced pitch-forward, settling quickly to stationary

segments.description: The vehicle is already fully stopped at the very start of this segment and remains completely motionless for the final three seconds, a few meters behind the bags under the concrete deck, treating the harmless small bags as road obstacles.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle held at a full stop from the beginning of the segment; camera stationary with minimal idle vibration; bags remain still and motionless on the road
segments.camera: Stationary dashcam view with minimal vibration from idling engine

temporal_caption: At 0:00, the view from inside a vehicle shows a road beneath an underpass at midday, bright daylight giving way to the sodium-LED glow under the concrete deck as the vehicle moves forward at a moderate pace in calm air; two small white polythene bags rest still on the road under the deck ahead. Around 0:01, the vehicle begins a sharp, abrupt deceleration, braking hard as the small bags sit motionless on the asphalt. By 0:02, the vehicle has come to a complete stop. From 0:02 to 0:05, the vehicle stays fully halted and motionless a few meters behind the two small polythene bags, which remain still on the road under the deck.
audio_description: Ambient echoing underpass audio begins with a boomy resonance and tire roll under the deck. Around 0:01 the engine note drops sharply and a brief hard-braking sound echoes off the concrete as the vehicle decelerates abruptly. The air is calm and still under the deck. By 0:02 the tire noise falls to near silence and, from 0:02 to 0:05, a low reverberant idle dominates while the bags rest silently on the road.
